name: Paracetamol
description: It is used to treat mild to moderate pain (from headaches, menstrual periods, toothaches, backaches, osteoarthritis, or cold/flu aches and pains) and to reduce fever.
precautions: Do not exceed the recommended dose. Avoid alcohol while taking this medication. Consult a doctor with severe liver issues.

name: Ibuprofen
description: Used to relieve pain from various conditions such as headache, dental pain, and muscle aches.
precautions: Risk of stomach bleeding. Avoid alcohol.
